summary: Iteration 4 (minimalist refactor) tested end-to-end. Backend: 11/11 pytest pass including new minimal artist-applications payload (artist→full_name, message→statement, no portfolio_url/years_experience). Frontend: All iteration-4 contracts verified — persistent floating brand-logo, hero-headline = 'INQUE' (no hero-cta-shop), philosophy-headline contains 'reengineered', salvix-section has product-01 + product-02 (no FAQ), simple program-form with field-artist/email/instagram/location/message/submit-program-btn, short-message validation toast (does NOT submit), valid submission → inquiry-success, contact link-only (mailto + instagram URL exact match, no form), nav-salvix/program/contact scroll correctly, nav-about absent, mobile menu shows 3 items only, brand-logo persists across scrolls.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: ArtistProgram.jsx success state is not reset; if user re-visits section after submission they cannot submit again until page reload. Acceptable for invitation form but worth noting.

Minor: Salvix.jsx GlassJar/GlassTube embed visible 'Salvix' / 'Balm' / 'Glide' text inside the rendered vessels in addition to the caption below; this duplicates the captions but matches iteration-4 visual design.
Minor: server.py — duplicate ISO conversion logic in list_inquiries / list_artist_applications could be DRY'd into a small helper, but not blocking.
Minor: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI on_event('shutdown'); consider lifespan handlers (non-blocking).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Test data created via TEST_-prefixed inquiries and artist-applications during pytest run; persisted to MongoDB (no cleanup endpoint exists in API).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 is verified. Removed test IDs (do NOT test): hero-cta-shop, salvix-faq-trigger-*, principle-0/1/2, tab-*, inquire-form, field-name/phone/concept, nav-about, marquee, footer sitemap. Active iteration-4 test IDs: brand-logo, hero-section, hero-headline, philosophy-section, philosophy-headline, salvix-section, product-01, product-02, program-section, program-form, field-artist, field-email, field-instagram, field-location, field-message, submit-program-btn, inquiry-success, contact-section, contact-email-link, contact-instagram, nav-salvix, nav-program, nav-contact, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu, mobile-nav-{salvix,program,contact}, site-navbar, site-footer. ArtistProgram payload mapping: artist→full_name, message→statement; backend validates statement min_length=20. Note: nav-contact scrollIntoView lands ~87px from top because contact is last section before footer — this is correct behavior, not a bug.
